aboard.en: All the passengers are aboard the ship.

acceptable.en: Your work is good and acceptable.
acceptable.zh: 你的作品很好，可以接受。

accurate.en: Her answer was quick and accurate.

ache.en: My head aches after a long day.

achieve.en: She worked hard to achieve her goal.
achieve.zh: 她努力工作以達成目標。

additional-adj-admire.en: We need additional chairs for the guests.
additional-adj-admire.zh: 我們需要額外的椅子給客人。

advanced.en: He is taking an advanced English class.

advantage.en: Being tall is an advantage in basketball.
advantage.zh: 個子高在籃球上是個優勢。

adventure.en: They went on an exciting adventure.
adventure.zh: 他們展開了一場刺激的冒險。

advertise.en: The company advertised its new phone on TV.
advertise.zh: 這家公司在電視上為新手機打廣告。

advise.en: The doctor advised me to rest.

adviser-advisor.en: My teacher is also my adviser.
adviser-advisor.zh: 我的老師也是我的顧問。

afford.en: I can't afford such an expensive car.

afterward-afterwards.en: We had dinner and went home afterward.
afterward-afterwards.zh: 我們吃了晚餐，之後就回家了。

agriculture.en: Agriculture is important for the country.
agriculture.zh: 農業對這個國家很重要。

airline.en: This airline flies to many countries.
airline.zh: 這家航空公司飛往許多國家。

alley.en: The cat ran into a dark alley.
alley.zh: 那隻貓跑進了一條黑暗的巷子。

almond.en: She added almonds to the cake.

amaze.en: The magic show amazed the children.
amaze.zh: 魔術表演讓孩子們驚嘆。

ambition.en: Her ambition is to become a scientist.
ambition.zh: 她的志向是成為科學家。

ambulance.en: The ambulance rushed to the hospital.

angel.en: The kind nurse was like an angel.
angel.zh: 那位親切的護士就像天使一樣。

announce.en: The teacher announced the test results.

anxious.en: She felt anxious before the interview.

anyhow.en: It was hard, but we finished anyhow.
anyhow.zh: 雖然很難，但我們還是完成了。

apart.en: The two houses are far apart.

appeal.en: The bright colors appeal to children.
appeal.zh: 鮮豔的顏色很吸引孩子。

approve.en: My parents approved of my plan.

apron.en: The cook wore a white apron.
apron.zh: 廚師繫著一條白色圍裙。

armed.en: An armed guard stood at the door.
armed.zh: 一名持槍的警衛站在門口。

ash.en: Only ash was left after the fire.

aside.en: She set the book aside and stood up.
aside.zh: 她把書放到一旁，站了起來。

assistant.en: The shop assistant helped me choose.

assume.en: I assume you have finished your homework.
assume.zh: 我猜你已經寫完功課了。

attitude.en: She has a positive attitude toward life.
attitude.zh: 她對人生抱持正面的態度。

attractive.en: The store window was very attractive.

audience.en: The audience clapped after the show.

automatic.en: The door is automatic and opens by itself.
automatic.zh: 這扇門是自動的，會自己打開。

automobile-auto.en: He works in an automobile factory.
automobile-auto.zh: 他在一家汽車工廠工作。

avenue.en: The shop is on a busy avenue.
avenue.zh: 這家店在一條繁忙的大街上。

awaken.en: The loud bell awakened the students.
awaken.zh: 響亮的鈴聲喚醒了學生。

award.en: She won an award for her painting.

aware.en: Are you aware of the danger?

awful.en: The weather was awful all week.

awkward.en: There was an awkward silence in the room.
awkward.zh: 房間裡出現了尷尬的沉默。

background.en: There are mountains in the background of the photo.

bacon.en: I had eggs and bacon for breakfast.

badly.en: He was badly hurt in the fall.

baggage.en: We checked our baggage at the airport.

bait.en: He used a worm as bait.

bang.en: The door shut with a loud bang.

bare.en: He walked on the grass with bare feet.

barely.en: I can barely see in the dark.
barely.zh: 在黑暗中我幾乎看不見。

barn.en: The cows sleep in the barn at night.

barrel.en: They stored water in a large barrel.
barrel.zh: 他們把水存在一個大桶子裡。

basement.en: We keep old boxes in the basement.
basement.zh: 我們把舊箱子放在地下室。

bay.en: Boats rested quietly in the bay.
bay.zh: 船隻安靜地停在海灣裡。

bead.en: She made a necklace with colorful beads.
bead.zh: 她用彩色的珠子做了一條項鍊。

beam.en: A beam of light came through the window.

beast.en: The story is about a kind beast.
beast.zh: 這個故事是關於一隻善良的野獸。

beetle.en: A black beetle crawled on the ground.

beneath.en: The cat hid beneath the table.

benefit.zh: 運動對健康有許多好處。

berry.en: Birds love to eat sweet berries.

besides.zh: 除了英文，她還會說法文。

bet.en: I bet you can't catch me.

bind.en: She bound the papers together with string.
bind.zh: 她用繩子把紙綁在一起。

bitter.en: The medicine has a bitter taste.

bless.en: Grandma blessed us before the trip.
bless.zh: 奶奶在旅行前為我們祝福。

bloody.en: There was a bloody scene in the movie.
bloody.zh: 電影裡有個血腥的場景。

blouse.en: She wore a white blouse to work.
blouse.zh: 她穿著一件白色女衫去上班。

bold.en: It was a bold plan, but it worked.
bold.zh: 那是個大膽的計畫，但成功了。

bomb.en: The old bomb was found underground.
bomb.zh: 那顆舊炸彈在地下被發現。

bookcase.en: The bookcase is full of novels.

boot.en: She wore rubber boots in the rain.

bore.en: The long speech bored the students.
bore.zh: 冗長的演講讓學生覺得無聊。

bowling.en: We went bowling on Friday night.
bowling.zh: 我們星期五晚上去打保齡球。

brake.en: He pressed the brake to stop the car.

brass.en: The lamp is made of shiny brass.
brass.zh: 這盞燈是用亮晶晶的黃銅做的。

bravery.zh: 那位消防員展現了極大的勇氣。

breast.en: She likes to eat chicken breast.

breath.en: Take a deep breath and relax.

breathe.en: It is hard to breathe in thin air.
breathe.zh: 在稀薄的空氣裡很難呼吸。

breeze.en: A cool breeze blew from the sea.
breeze.zh: 一陣涼爽的微風從海上吹來。

brick.en: The house is built of red brick.
brick.zh: 這棟房子是用紅磚蓋的。

bride.en: The bride wore a beautiful white dress.
bride.zh: 新娘穿著美麗的白色禮服。

broadcast.en: The game was broadcast live on TV.
broadcast.zh: 這場比賽在電視上現場轉播。

brunch.en: We had a late brunch on Sunday.
brunch.zh: 我們星期天吃了一頓晚的早午餐。

bucket.en: She filled the bucket with water.

bud.en: The flower buds opened in spring.

budget.en: We made a budget for the trip.

buffalo.en: A buffalo drank from the river.

buffet.en: The hotel offers a breakfast buffet.
buffet.zh: 這家飯店提供自助式早餐。

bull.en: The angry bull charged at the gate.
bull.zh: 憤怒的公牛朝門衝過去。

bump.en: Be careful not to bump your head.

bunch.en: He bought a bunch of bananas.

bundle.en: She tied the letters into a bundle.

bury.en: The dog buried its bone in the yard.
bury.zh: 那隻狗把骨頭埋在院子裡。

bush.en: A small bird hid in the bush.
bush.zh: 一隻小鳥躲在灌木叢裡。

buzz.en: A bee buzzed around the flower.
buzz.zh: 一隻蜜蜂繞著花嗡嗡叫。

cabin.en: They stayed in a wooden cabin in the woods.
cabin.zh: 他們住在樹林裡的木屋。

cable.en: Connect the cable to the computer.
cable.zh: 把這條纜線接到電腦上。

cafeteria.en: We have lunch in the school cafeteria.
cafeteria.zh: 我們在學校自助餐廳吃午餐。

campus.en: The university has a large campus.
campus.zh: 這所大學有廣闊的校園。

canyon.en: The river runs through a deep canyon.
canyon.zh: 河流穿過一道深邃的峽谷。

capable.en: She is capable of solving hard problems.

captain.en: The captain led the team to victory.

capture.en: The hunters captured a wild animal.
capture.zh: 獵人捕獲了一隻野生動物。

career.en: She chose teaching as her career.

carpenter.en: The carpenter made a wooden chair.

carpet.en: There is a soft carpet on the floor.
carpet.zh: 地板上鋪著柔軟的地毯。

carriage.en: A horse pulled the old carriage.
carriage.zh: 一匹馬拉著那輛舊馬車。

cart.en: She pushed the shopping cart down the aisle.
cart.zh: 她推著購物車走過走道。

cast.en: He cast his line into the river.

casual.en: Wear casual clothes to the picnic.
casual.zh: 野餐穿輕便的衣服就好。

cave.en: Bats live in the dark cave.
cave.zh: 蝙蝠住在黑暗的洞穴裡。

champion.en: She is the swimming champion this year.

charm.en: Her smile is full of charm.

chat.en: We had a friendly chat over coffee.
chat.zh: 我們邊喝咖啡邊愉快地聊天。

cheek.en: The baby has soft pink cheeks.
cheek.zh: 寶寶有柔軟的粉紅臉頰。

cheerful.en: She greeted us in a cheerful voice.
cheerful.zh: 她用開朗的聲音向我們打招呼。

cherry.en: There is a cherry on top of the cake.

chest.en: He felt a pain in his chest.

chill.en: I felt a chill when the wind blew.
chill.zh: 風吹來時我感到一陣寒意。

chilly.en: It is chilly outside this morning.

chin.en: He rested his chin on his hand.

chip.en: There is a tiny chip inside the phone.
chip.zh: 手機裡有一個微小的晶片。

chop.en: She chopped the onions into small pieces.

cigarette.en: Smoking cigarettes is bad for your health.

cinema.en: We watched a movie at the cinema.
cinema.zh: 我們在電影院看了一部電影。

circus.en: The children laughed at the circus.
circus.zh: 孩子們在馬戲團裡笑得很開心。

citizen.en: Every citizen has the right to vote.
citizen.zh: 每位公民都有投票的權利。

civil.en: They discussed the problem in a civil way.
civil.zh: 他們以理性的方式討論問題。

clay.en: The artist made a bowl from clay.
clay.zh: 藝術家用黏土做了一個碗。

cleaner.en: The cleaner mops the office floor.
cleaner.zh: 清潔工拖辦公室的地板。

client.en: The lawyer met with her client.

clinic.en: I went to the clinic for a check-up.

clip.en: Use a clip to hold the papers together.
clip.zh: 用夾子把這些紙夾在一起。

closet.en: Her clothes are hung in the closet.

clothe.en: They worked hard to feed and clothe the family.
clothe.zh: 他們努力工作以養活並讓家人有衣穿。

clown.zh: 小丑逗得大家哈哈大笑。

clue.en: The detective looked for a clue.

coach.en: The coach taught us how to swim.

cocktail.en: The adults enjoyed a fruit cocktail.
cocktail.zh: 大人們享用著水果調酒。

coconut.zh: 我們喝了新鮮的椰子水。

collar.en: The shirt has a clean white collar.
collar.zh: 這件襯衫有乾淨的白領子。

collection.en: He has a large stamp collection.

colony.en: Ants live together in a colony.
colony.zh: 螞蟻群居在一個群體裡。

colorful.en: The garden is full of colorful flowers.
colorful.zh: 花園裡開滿了色彩繽紛的花。

column.en: Tall stone columns held up the roof.
column.zh: 高大的石柱撐起了屋頂。

comfort.zh: 她安慰那個哭泣的孩子。

comma.en: Put a comma after the first word.
comma.zh: 在第一個字後面加一個逗號。
